title: Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards)
use_when: Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards). Use when the user needs a product workflow for presentation & communication related to press releases from product vision (working backwards). Trigger terms: storytelling, press-release, working-backwards, product-strategy, communication, influence.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) fits Marketing work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) as generic Marketing advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $press-releases-from-product-vision-working-backwards to turn this press context into a decision-ready Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Press releases from product vision (Working Backwards) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
